query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, cp.token_balance, cp.total_tokens_earned, cp.last_weekly_reward 
FROM user u 
LEFT JOIN customer_profiles cp ON u.id = cp.user_id 
WHERE u.email = 'natesdadclint@gmail.com';
